message:
fix(context): improve JSON parsing for robot mode context output

Problem: ParseRobotModeContext() attempted to parse entire output as
JSON, but agent output often contains mixed text (logs, prompts) with
JSON embedded on specific lines.

Solution: Scan output line-by-line looking for lines that:
1. Contain "context_used" or "tokens_used" keys
2. Start with '{' and end with '}'
3. Successfully unmarshal as JSON

Falls back to whole-blob parsing for clean multiline JSON.

This handles real-world scenarios where agent output includes:
- Log prefixes before JSON
- Status messages after JSON
- Multiple JSON objects in output
- Progress indicators mixed in

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
